                        if (window.myop_cta_handler) {
                            window.myop_cta_handler('duplicate_scene_attempt', { scene_name: sceneName, message: 'Duplicate functionality requested' });
                        }
                    }
                }, mediaCount, sceneType, currentTriggerId); // Pass ID
            }
        });

        container.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => {
            draggedMedia = photo.id;
            preDragOrder = currentMedia.map(m => m.id); // Snapshot order

            // DISABLED: Force hide tooltip immediately on drag start - uncomment to restore
            // hideTooltip();

            try {
                e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', photo.id);
                e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';

                // Use the image element specifically as the drag image
                const img = container.querySelector('img');
                const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
                const offsetX = e.clientX - rect.left;
                const offsetY = e.clientY - rect.top;

                // Check if setDragImage is supported (it should be)
                if (e.dataTransfer.setDragImage) {
                    e.dataTransfer.setDragImage(img, offsetX, offsetY);
                }

            } catch (err) {
                console.error("Drag start error:", err);
            }
        });
        container.addEventListener('dragend', () => {
            state.isDraggingOrClicking = false; // FIX: Ensure we reset this state so tooltips work again
            draggedMedia = null;
            cleanupPlaceholder();
            const orderPayload = currentMedia.map(item => preDragOrder.indexOf(item.id));
            sendToServer('media_order_update', { scene_id: sceneId, order: orderPayload });
        });

        container.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
            if (!draggedMedia || draggedMedia === photo.id) return;
            e.preventDefault();
            const draggedObj = currentMedia.find(p => p.id === draggedMedia); if (!draggedObj) return;
            const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
            const before = (e.clientX - rect.left) < rect.width / 2;
            const ph = ensurePlaceholder(draggedObj.width, draggedObj.height);
            const parent = container.parentNode;
            if (before) { if (ph.parentNode !== parent || ph.nextSibling !== container) { parent.insertBefore(ph, container); } }
            else { if (ph.parentNode !== parent || ph.previousSibling !== container) { if (container.nextSibling) parent.insertBefore(ph, container.nextSibling); else parent.appendChild(ph); } }
            e.stopPropagation();
        });

        container.addEventListener('drop', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); dropIntoPlaceholder(); });

        return container;
    }

    function renderGrid(gridElement) {
        if (!gridElement) return;
        gridElement.innerHTML = '';
        const gridLayout = arrangeMediaInRows();
        gridLayout.forEach((row, rowIndex) => {
            const rowEl = document.createElement('div'); rowEl.className = 'flex items-start custom-gap mb-2';
            if (rowIndex === gridLayout.length - 1) { rowEl.classList.add('mb-0'); }
            rowEl.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
                if (!draggedMedia || draggedMedia === rowEl.dataset.photoId) return; // Prevent dragging over self (if applicable)
                if (e.target !== rowEl) return;
                e.preventDefault();
                const draggedObj = currentMedia.find(p => p.id === draggedMedia); if (!draggedObj) return;
                const ph = ensurePlaceholder(draggedObj.width, draggedObj.height);
                if (ph.parentNode !== rowEl || ph.nextSibling) { rowEl.appendChild(ph); }
            });
            rowEl.addEventListener('drop', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); dropIntoPlaceholder(); });

            row.forEach((photo) => {
                // MODIFIED: Check if photo is main photo
                const truePhotoIndex = currentMedia.findIndex(p => p.id === photo.id);
                const isMainPhoto = truePhotoIndex === 0;
                // MODIFIED: Pass isMainPhoto and sceneId to createMediaItem
                rowEl.appendChild(createMediaItem(photo, currentMedia.length, isMainPhoto, sceneId));
            });
            gridElement.appendChild(rowEl);
        });
    }

    return hover;
}

// Expose CTA handler globally
window.myop_cta_handler = myop_cta_handler;

/**
 * myop_init_interface
 * Initializes the interface with the provided configuration object.
 * @param {object} userConfig 
 */
window.myop_init_interface = function (userConfig) {
    // Getter mode: return current state if called with no arguments
    if (!userConfig) return state.config;

    // Deep merge user config with a default structure to prevent errors
    const defaultConfig = {
        fonts: [],
        fontUrls: [],
        lang: {},
        mode: 'design',
        textOnly: false,
        photoCount: 0,
        scenes: [],
        coverDesigns: [],
        paletteColors: [],
        colors: { mode: 'design_set', design_set_2: { text: '#FF0000' }, manual: { text: '#000000', background: '#FFFFFF' } },
        text: {
            style: 'design_set',
            fonts: [],
            textElements: []
        }
    };

    state.config = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(defaultConfig));
    deepMerge(state.config, userConfig);

    // Normalize textElements: map server case values to internal dropdown values
    // Server sends: "uppercase", "lowercase", "title", "sentence", "astyped"
    // Internal uses: "uppercase", "lowercase", "title_case", "sentence_case", "as_typed"
    const caseValueMap = { title: 'title_case', sentence: 'sentence_case', astyped: 'as_typed' };
    if (state.config.text && state.config.text.textElements) {
        state.config.text.textElements.forEach(el => {
            if (el.currentCase) {
                const lower = el.currentCase.toLowerCase();
                el.currentCase = caseValueMap[lower] || lower;
            }
        });
    }

    // --- Apply Mode Specific Changes ---
    const isTemplateMode = state.config.mode === 'template';

    const headerFixed = document.getElementById('header-fixed');
    const tabsContainer = document.getElementById('tabs-container');
    const mediaContent = document.getElementById('media-content');
    const designContent = document.getElementById('design-content');

    if (isTemplateMode) {
        // Template Mode: Hide tabs and media content
        document.body.classList.add('template-mode');
        if (tabsContainer) tabsContainer.classList.add('hidden');
        if (mediaContent) mediaContent.classList.add('hidden');

        // Adjust header padding when tabs are hidden
        if (headerFixed) {
            headerFixed.style.paddingBottom = '24px';
        }
        // Adjust content padding to move up
        if (designContent) {
            designContent.classList.remove('pt-[92px]');
            designContent.classList.add('content-padding-top');
        }

        // Ensure design content is visible
        designContent.classList.remove('hidden');

    } else {
        // Design Mode (Default): Ensure tabs are visible and media content is active
        document.body.classList.remove('template-mode');
        if (tabsContainer) tabsContainer.classList.remove('hidden');
        if (mediaContent) mediaContent.classList.remove('hidden');
        if (designContent) {
            designContent.classList.add('pt-[92px]');
            designContent.classList.remove('content-padding-top');
        }
    }


    // --- Load External Fonts ---
    if (state.config.fontUrls && Array.isArray(state.config.fontUrls)) {
        state.config.fontUrls.forEach(url => {
            const link = document.createElement('link');
            link.rel = 'stylesheet';
            link.href = url;
            document.head.appendChild(link);
        });
    }

    // --- Apply Config Fonts as CSS Variables ---
    const fontLoadPromises = [];
    if (state.config.fonts && Array.isArray(state.config.fonts)) {
        const root = document.documentElement;
        state.config.fonts.forEach(font => {
            // Set CSS variables: --font_{id}, --font_{id}_style, --font_{id}_weight
            const varPrefix = '--font_' + font.id;
            root.style.setProperty(varPrefix, '"' + font.family + '", sans-serif');
            if (font.style) {
                root.style.setProperty(varPrefix + '_style', font.style);
            }
            if (font.weight !== undefined) {
                root.style.setProperty(varPrefix + '_weight', String(font.weight));
            }
            // Load the font CSS file and track load promise
            if (font.url) {
                const link = document.createElement('link');
                link.rel = 'stylesheet';
                link.href = font.url;
                document.head.appendChild(link);
                const loadPromise = new Promise(resolve => {
                    link.onload = resolve;
                    link.onerror = resolve; // Resolve on error too so we don't block forever
                });
                fontLoadPromises.push(loadPromise);
            }
        });
    }

    // Hide app-root until fonts are ready
    const appRoot = document.getElementById('app-root');
    if (appRoot) appRoot.style.visibility = 'hidden';

    // Wait for all font stylesheets to load, then wait for fonts to be ready
    Promise.all(fontLoadPromises)
        .then(() => document.fonts.ready)
        .then(() => {
            if (appRoot) appRoot.style.visibility = '';
            _doRender();
        });

    function _doRender() {

    // Update state from the merged config
    state.lang = state.config.lang;
    state.scenes = state.config.scenes;
    state.scenes = state.config.scenes;
    state.coverDesigns = state.config.coverDesigns;
    state.paletteColors = state.config.paletteColors || []; // NEW: Sync palette colors

    // Initialize premium icon system
    currentLang = state.lang;
    if (state.config.icons) {
        ICON_SVGS = state.config.icons;
    }

    // Initialize textOnly based on selected design (if not provided by server)
    if (state.config.textOnly === undefined) {
        const selectedDesign = state.coverDesigns.find(d => d.isSelected);
        state.config.textOnly = selectedDesign ? (selectedDesign.textOnly === true) : false;
    }

    // Setup UI text
    setupCopy(state.lang);
    // Set initial dropdown labels correctly based on config
    const colorMode = state.config.colors.mode;
    const colorModeParts = colorMode.split('_');
    const colorModeLangKey = 'colorMode' + colorModeParts.map(p => p.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + p.slice(1)).join('');
    if (state.lang[colorModeLangKey]) {
        document.getElementById('color-mode-label').textContent = state.lang[colorModeLangKey];
    }

    const textStyle = state.config.text.style;
    const textStyleParts = textStyle.split('_');
    const textStyleLangKey = 'textStyle' + textStyleParts.map(p => p.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + p.slice(1)).join('');
    if (state.lang[textStyleLangKey]) {
        document.getElementById('text-style-label').textContent = state.lang[textStyleLangKey];
    }

    // Re-render components with current state
    // NEW: Reset accordion state
    state.isDesignsExpanded = false;
    document.getElementById('lang-showAllDesigns-text').textContent = state.lang.showAllDesigns || "Show all designs";
    document.getElementById('designs-chevron').classList.remove('rotated');

    const gridEl = document.getElementById('design-templates');
    gridEl.classList.remove('expanded');
    gridEl.style.maxHeight = '300px'; // NEW: Ensure it starts at 92px

    renderDesignTemplates(state.coverDesigns); // NEW: Render ALL designs from the start

    const showAllButton = document.getElementById('show-all-designs-button');
    if (state.coverDesigns.length <= 18) {
        showAllButton.style.display = 'none';
    } else {
        showAllButton.style.display = 'flex';
    }

    renderAllScenes();

    // Switch to Design tab if selected design is text-only (runs on every render)
    updateTabsForTextOnly();

    // This flag makes sure we only attach listeners once
    if (!state.oneTimeListenersAttached) {
        initializeTabs();
        initializeBackButton();
        initializeColorPicker();
        initializeHideOverlayCheckbox();

        document.getElementById('design-templates').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            const wrapper = e.target.closest('.cover-wrapper');
            if (wrapper) {
                const selectedId = wrapper.dataset.coverId;
                sendToServer('design_cover_update', { cover_id: selectedId });
                state.coverDesigns.forEach(d => d.isSelected = (d.id === selectedId));

                // Update textOnly based on selected design
                const selectedDesign = state.coverDesigns.find(d => d.id === selectedId);
                state.config.textOnly = selectedDesign ? (selectedDesign.textOnly === true) : false;

                renderDesignTemplates(state.coverDesigns);
                updateColorSwatchVisibility();

                // Re-render scenes to show/hide media based on textOnly
                renderAllScenes();
            }
        });

        // NEW: Updated click listener for accordion
        document.getElementById('show-all-designs-button').addEventListener('click', () => {
            state.isDesignsExpanded = !state.isDesignsExpanded; // Toggle the state

            const textEl = document.getElementById('lang-showAllDesigns-text');
            const chevronEl = document.getElementById('designs-chevron');
            const gridEl = document.getElementById('design-templates'); // NEW

            if (state.isDesignsExpanded) {
                // Expand
                const scrollHeight = gridEl.scrollHeight;
                gridEl.style.maxHeight = scrollHeight + 'px';
                gridEl.classList.add('expanded');
                if (state.lang.showFewerDesigns) textEl.textContent = state.lang.showFewerDesigns;
                chevronEl.classList.add('rotated');

                // After animation, remove inline style to allow dynamic resizing
                const onExpandEnd = () => {
                    gridEl.removeEventListener('transitionend', onExpandEnd);
                    if (state.isDesignsExpanded) { // Check state again
                        gridEl.style.maxHeight = 'none'; // Use 'none' to allow full height
                    }
                };
                gridEl.addEventListener('transitionend', onExpandEnd);

            } else {
                // Collapse
                // Set max-height to current computed height (or scrollHeight) to animate FROM
                gridEl.style.maxHeight = gridEl.scrollHeight + 'px';

                // Force a reflow so browser registers the new max-height
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    gridEl.style.maxHeight = '300px';
                    gridEl.classList.remove('expanded');
                    if (state.lang.showAllDesigns) textEl.textContent = state.lang.showAllDesigns;
                    chevronEl.classList.remove('rotated');
                });
            }
        });

        // Delegated event listener for scene clicks — entire hover-bg-wrapper is clickable
        document.getElementById('scenes-root').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            // Skip if click was on an interactive child element
            if (e.target.closest('a, button, input, select, textarea, .focal-point-dot')) return;
            const wrapper = e.target.closest('.hover-bg-wrapper');
            if (wrapper) {
                const sceneId = wrapper.dataset.sceneId;
                sendToServer('scene_background_click', { scene_id: sceneId });
            }
        });

        // Global mouse down/up listeners to track clicking/dragging state
        document.addEventListener('mousedown', () => { state.isDraggingOrClicking = true; });
        document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => { state.isDraggingOrClicking = false; });


        document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.visible').forEach(menu => {
                if (!menu.parentElement.contains(e.target)) {
                    menu.classList.remove('visible');
                    const triggerId = menu.id.replace('-menu', '-dropdown-trigger');
                    const trigger = document.getElementById(triggerId);
                    if (trigger) {
                        trigger.querySelector('svg')?.classList.remove('rotated');
                    }
                }
            });

            const colorPickerWrapper = document.getElementById('color-picker-wrapper');
            if (!colorPickerWrapper.classList.contains('hidden') && !colorPickerWrapper.contains(e.target) && !e.target.closest('[id$="-picker-trigger"]')) {
                colorPickerWrapper.classList.add('hidden');
                if (addRecentColor) addRecentColor(document.getElementById('hex-input').value);
            }

            // --- Context Menu ---
            const isClickOnMenuTrigger = e.target.closest('.menu-dots');
            const contextMenuEl = document.getElementById('context-menu');
            const isClickOnMenu = contextMenuEl.contains(e.target);

            if (!isClickOnMenuTrigger && !isClickOnMenu) {
                hideContextMenu();
            }
        });
        state.oneTimeListenersAttached = true;
    }

    // These components need to be re-initialized if the config changes
    initializeDropdown('color-mode-dropdown-trigger', 'color-mode-menu', 'color-mode-label', 'color_mode_update', 'mode');
    initializeDropdown('text-style-dropdown-trigger', 'text-style-menu', 'text-style-label', 'text_style_update', 'style');
    initializeTextControls(state.config.text.textElements);
    initializeCollapsible('colors-trigger', 'colors-content', state.config.colors.mode === 'manual');
    initializeCollapsible('text-trigger', 'text-content', state.config.text.style === 'manual');

    // Ensure UI visibility is correct and update swatches
    updateColorSwatchVisibility();
    updateTextStyleSectionVisibility(true); // Skip scroll on initial load
    updateTextSwatch();
    updateBackgroundSwatch();
    updateHideOverlayCheckbox();
    } // end _doRender
};

function updateHideOverlayCheckbox() {
    const checkmark = document.getElementById('hide-overlay-checkmark');
    if (!checkmark) return;
    const isChecked = state.config.colors && state.config.colors.hideOverlay === true;
    checkmark.classList.toggle('hidden', !isChecked);
}
